headline: A QUALITY MANUAL PEOPLE ACTUALLY USE
subheading: Write a lean, ICH Q10-aligned manual your staff and inspectors trust every day.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial concept of a layered pharmaceutical documentation hierarchy: a single slim translucent panel floating at the top, connected by clean glowing thread-lines to progressively smaller stacked tiers beneath it, visualising a quality manual that points to procedures rather than duplicating them. Crisp geometric layers of frosted glass and brushed metal hover in a calm, ordered arrangement against a deep navy gradient background, lit by cool teal and cyan light with one subtle fresh-green accent line tracing a cross-reference connection between layers. Shallow depth of field, soft raking light from the left, gentle reflections on polished surfaces, precise and quietly premium clinical-luxury mood, sense of clarity, structure and trustworthy order, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
